mnemonics.title: Mnemonic 2
mnemonics.content: Bernoulli's Binomial Basics: Fixed trials, Two outcomes, Constant probability, Independent events

mnemonics.title: Key Point 1
mnemonics.content: Describes the probability of exactly k successes in n independent Bernoulli trials

mnemonics.title: Key Point 2
mnemonics.content: Requires fixed number of trials, two possible outcomes per trial, constant probability of success, and independent trials

mnemonics.title: Key Point 3
mnemonics.content: Probability mass function: P(X=k) = C(n,k) * p^k * (1-p)^(n-k) where C(n,k) is the binomial coefficient
